name: China Health and Retirement Longitudinal Study
accessMode: registered user download through CHARLS data portal
rawDataPolicy: Do not commit raw CHARLS data to this repository. Store user-downloaded files under a local ignored directory and keep only derived non-identifiable outputs that comply with CHARLS terms.
officialFacts: Nationally representative sample of Chinese residents ages 45 and older
Baseline national wave fielded in 2011 with about 10,000 households and 17,500 individuals
Website exposes sign in/sign up and data portal links
News page reports Wave 5 (2020) National Followup Survey Data released on 2023-11-16
